narrative:
Perry Twp township has 3,214 registered voters, with 54.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.5 percentage points.
